name: Construction
summary: The data-center buildout, IRA-fueled infrastructure, and reshoring story. CAT supplies heavy equipment; MLM supplies aggregates and building materials; EME and FIX provide electrical and HVAC contracting; GVA provides civil construction; PWR builds the power-grid interconnects, substations, and transmission for new-load projects. The thesis is that the next several years of US infrastructure investment compound across all six.

relationships.note: Electrical (EME) and HVAC (FIX) contractors selling into the same data-center and reshoring jobs
Aggregates and civil-construction names benefit from the same federal infra spend
CAT machines on EME job sites — heavy equipment into electrical-contracting backlog
CAT machines on GVA civil sites
PWR transmission/substation projects pull aggregates from MLM
Both build the electrical side of new-load campuses
